channel.title: at - Automatisierungstechnik
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in at - Automatisierungstechnik

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Peng Jieyang, Wang Dongkun, Andreas Kimmig, Bin Zhang, Armin Roux, Jivka Ovtcharova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/auto-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Information Circularity Assistance based on extreme data

item.title: Subjective task-load influences anthropomorphism during cooperative human and robot hand movements
item.description: Article by Peng Jieyang, Wang Dongkun, Andreas Kimmig, Bin Zhang, Armin Roux, Jivka Ovtcharova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/auto-2024-0031

item.title: Concept study of an autonomous aerial mobile network relay for pre-hospital emergency care
item.description: Article by Peng Jieyang, Wang Dongkun, Andreas Kimmig, Bin Zhang, Armin Roux, Jivka Ovtcharova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/auto-2024-0032

item.title: Challenges and requirements of AI-based waste water treatment systems
item.description: Article by Peng Jieyang, Wang Dongkun, Andreas Kimmig, Bin Zhang, Armin Roux, Jivka Ovtcharova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/auto-2024-0023

item.title: Modeling propagation competition between hostile influential groups using opinion dynamics
item.description: Article by Peng Jieyang, Wang Dongkun, Andreas Kimmig, Bin Zhang, Armin Roux, Jivka Ovtcharova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/auto-2023-0200

item.title: Hesse-Matrix-basierte Qualitätsmanagementsysteme für die Fertigungsindustrie
item.description: Article by Peng Jieyang, Wang Dongkun, Andreas Kimmig, Bin Zhang, Armin Roux, Jivka Ovtcharova DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/auto-2024-0004
